mapper.select: SELECT * FROM booking_order WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND DATE(booking_date) = DATE(#{bookingDate}) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time
SELECT b.*, d.device_name, d.device_no FROM booking_order b LEFT JOIN device_info d ON b.device_id = d.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.create_time DESC

SELECT b.*, d.device_name, d.device_no, u.username as userName FROM booking_order b LEFT JOIN device_info d ON b.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.status = 0 AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.create_time ASC

SELECT b.*, d.device_name, d.device_no, rd.device_name AS replaceDeviceName, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(u.real_name), ''), u.username) AS userName FROM booking_order b LEFT JOIN device_info d ON b.device_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN device_info rd ON b.replace_device_id = rd.id AND rd.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE b.status = 0 AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM booking_order WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND DATE(booking_date) = DATE(#{bookingDate}) AND status IN (0, 1) AND deleted = 0 AND ( (start_time <= #{startTime} AND end_time > #{startTime}) OR (start_time < #{endTime} AND end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (start_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime}) )

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejectedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedCount FROM booking_order WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT DATE(booking_date) as dateStr, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM booking_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (0, 1, 3) AND booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(booking_date) ORDER BY dateStr

SELECT start_time as hourStr, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM booking_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (0, 1, 3) AND booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY start_time ORDER BY start_time

SELECT AVG( TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, create_time, audit_time) / 60.0 ) FROM booking_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (1, 2) AND audit_time IS NOT NULL
AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT DATE(create_time) as dateStr, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, create_time, audit_time) / 60.0) as avgWaitHours FROM booking_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (1, 2) AND audit_time IS NOT NULL AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY dateStr

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1, 3)
AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) FROM booking_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1, 3)
AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT b.*, d.device_name, d.device_no, rd.device_name AS replaceDeviceName, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(u.real_name), ''), u.username) AS userName FROM booking_order b LEFT JOIN device_info d ON b.device_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN device_info rd ON b.replace_device_id = rd.id AND rd.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0
AND b.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND d.device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
AND ( u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%') )
AND b.status = #{status}
AND b.status = 2
AND b.status = 4
AND b.status IN (0, 1, 3)
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC

SELECT d.id AS deviceId, d.device_name AS deviceName, d.device_no AS deviceNo, COUNT(*) AS bookingCount FROM booking_order b INNER JOIN device_info d ON b.device_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 AND b.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY d.id, d.device_name, d.device_no ORDER BY bookingCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT d.device_name AS deviceName, d.device_no AS deviceNo, c.category_name AS category, lst.lastTime AS lastUsedDate, CASE WHEN lst.lastTime IS NULL THEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(d.create_time)) ELSE DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(lst.lastTime)) END AS idleDays FROM device_info d LEFT JOIN device_category c ON d.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(create_time) AS lastTime FROM booking_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (1, 3) GROUP BY device_id ) lst ON lst.device_id = d.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.status IN (0, 1, 2, 3) AND ( lst.lastTime IS NULL OR lst.lastTime < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ) ORDER BY idleDays DESC LIMIT #{limit}
